task_completion.description: Extract First Aid procedures for Eye and Skin contact into a summary text file.

integrity.description: The agent used a real web browser to access the CDC website rather than curling or using terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard GUI web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) navigating the CDC website.

integrity.description: The PDFs were generated using the browser's print-to-PDF or save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the browser's print dialog or save dialog being used to create the PDFs, rather than terminal commands creating empty files.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI text editor to compile the first aid summary.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor (like gedit, mousepad, or similar) being used to paste and format the extracted text, rather than terminal echo commands.
